key_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Magazine Editorial with SaaS Dashboard precision
Content is King: Typography and negative space drive the hierarchy
Dark-First: The interface is a dark room; content is the spotlight
Generous Spacing: 2x-3x standard Tailwind spacing (p-8, p-12)

grid_system.card_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8

card.base: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative group

button.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
button.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all
button.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

input.style: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-white/30 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 border-b border-white/5 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-black/20

tags.style: px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-xs font-medium text-zinc-300 uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: before:fixed before:inset-0 before:z-[-1] before:bg-[url('/images/noise.png')] before:opacity-[0.03] before:pointer-events-none

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract metallic wave pattern, perfect for Hero Section background with low opacity overlay
Vibrant cityscape night, good for 'Trending Topics' or 'Future Tech' section cover

editorial_thumbnails.description: MacBook on table, great for 'Tools & Resources' or 'Productivity' articles
Ergonomic chair/desk, use for 'Work Setup' or 'Office Culture' content
Lone figure in neon rain, conceptual image for 'AI Impact' or 'Cybersecurity'

category_abstracts.description: Geometric shapes, use for 'Design Patterns' or 'Architecture' collection cover
Dark textured surface, good for 'Developer Tools' background

types.fade_in_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
types.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. START by installing the fonts: Manrope (Body), Playfair Display (Headings), JetBrains Mono (Code).
2. UPDATE tailwind.config.ts/js to include the new colors (obsidian, surface, etc) and fonts.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Set 'body' to bg-[#0A0A0A] and text-[#EDEDED]. Remove any white backgrounds.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn, strip the default 'bg-background' and 'border-border' if they don't match the new palette. Use explicit custom classes from 'customizations' section.
5. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. DO NOT use placeholders. If an image is missing, reuse a similar one from the list.
6. GRID: For the 'Discover' page, use the Bento Grid strategy. Don't just stack cards vertically.
7. NAVIGATION: Build a custom Navigation component using the 'wrapper' styles. It must have the glassmorphism effect.
8. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
9. ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' (default) but style them thinly (stroke-width={1.5}) to match the elegant editorial vibe.
10. THEME: Force Dark Mode by default. If a theme toggle is implemented, ensure Light Mode is 'Paper/Ivory' based, not stark white.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' AI outputs. Be bold with spacing and type size.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
